title: Ai no Senshi Rainbowman
titleNative: 愛の戦士レインボーマン
synopsis: In the mountains of India, a man named Takeshi Yamato gains the abilities of the legendary Rainbow Warrior, allowing him to transform into Rainbowman. With this power, he has to stop aliens from invading the earth.

title: Jiu Tian Xuan Di Jue 2
titleNative: 九天玄帝诀 第二季
synonyms: The Success Of Empyrean Xuan Emperor 2
synopsis: The second season of Jiu Tian Xuan Di Jue .

tags.name: Full CGI
tags.description: Almost entirely created with computer-generated imagery.

title: Senjuushi: Kijuushi-tachi no Happy Birthday!
titleNative: 千銃士 貴銃士たちのハッピーバースデイ!
synopsis: The OVA will tell a "heartwarming, hilarious slice-of-life story" about the noble musketeers holding a surprise birthday party for Master on a certain day after the events of episode 6.

title: Hinomaru Hatanosuke: Inazuma-gumi Tobatsu no Maki
titleRomaji: Hinomaru Hatanosuke: Inazuma-gumi Tobatsu no Maki
titleNative: 日の丸旗之助～稲妻組討伐の巻～
synonyms: Hatanosuke Takes Down the Inazuma Gang
synopsis: Short film where the hero Hatanosuke battles with an evil gang of thieves.

tags.name: Historical
tags.description: Partly or completely set during a real period of world history.

tags.name: Achromatic
tags.description: Contains animation that is primarily done in black and white.

title: Yamato Takeru: After War
titleNative: ヤマトタケル ～After War～
synopsis: Three years have passed after the decisive battle at the end of Yamato Takeru and peace has return to the land. Takeru, Oto and their friends return to the village and continue living their days in bliss until one night Shuranoo, piloted by Mikazuchi, marks a return and appears in the village to wreak havoc. Takeru is left without any choice and is forced to reactivate the sealed Susanoo from his slumber. However, this is just the beginning of a new threat, and Takeru has to overcome himself if he wants to rescue Oto from the impending danger. (Source: AniDB)

synopsis: The sequel to Cap Kakumei Bottleman .

tags.name: Proxy Battle
tags.description: A proxy battle is a battle where humans use creatures/robots to do the fighting for them, either by commanding those creatures/robots or by simply evolving them/changing them into battle mode.

tags.description: Target demographic is young children.

tags.name: Battle Royale
tags.description: Centers around a fierce group competition, often violent and with only one winner.

tags.description: Intelligent non-organic machines that work and react similarly to humans.

title: Yishi Zhi Zun
titleNative: 一世之尊
synopsis: Meng Qi is a time traveler who always wants to be a charming swordsman in white. But unexpectedly, he becomes a world-renowned “mad monk holding a blade” while accomplishing a tough mission in the infinitely continuous “time travel”. Yet, everything turns out to be the trick of an ancient lord. This story tells the legend of a funny monk who wanders around in the world of martial arts and the three realms. (Source: bilibili Youtube)

tags.name: Full CGI
tags.description: Almost entirely created with computer-generated imagery.

tags.name: Time Manipulation

tags.name: Kids

title: Ikkyuu-san
titleNative: 一球さん
synopsis: High-school student Ikkyuu knows nothing about baseball, but his talents are recognized by the manager of the baseball club, and he takes up this enchanting sport. While his ignorance of the game leads him to make many mistakes, Ikkyuu - who is in fact a descendant of ninja - displays his superhuman abilities and leads the team to the High School Baseball Championships. (Source: Nippon Animation)

tags.name: School
tags.description: Partly or completely set in a primary or secondary educational institution.

tags.name: Baseball
tags.description: Centers around the sport of baseball.

title: Starlight Scramble
titleNative: スターライトスクランブル 恋愛候補生
synopsis: In the near future, during the colony war, a girl was save by a little boy when a space station was attacked by terrorists in which the girl lost her parents. A few years later, the girl joined her grandfather's military school. There she met a young man that looked similar to the boy who saved her... but just when she was prepared to enter the school compound, she sees a 'terrorist' lurking around which is actually a terrorist demo under the school command and so the story begins... (Source: AniDB)

title: Kaiju Jiu You Wang Zhe Zhanghao
titleRomaji: Kaiju Jiu You Wang Zhe Zhanghao
titleNative: 开局就有王者账号
synonyms: A Beginner with the Mightiest Account
It Starts with a Kingpin Account
There is a King Account at the Start
Start to Have the King Account
synopsis: The sudden crisis brought the earth directly into the OL era, and all mankind was under the influence of mysterious forces. Everyone became a level-one newbie. In this cruel dog-eat-dog world, the high school student Ye Hao could only rise to level three. When he was about to die, he accidentally triggered the king's account upgrade system, can Ye Hao become the strongest king? (Source: AC.QQ, translated)

titleNative: ウルトラマン超闘士激伝 彗星戦神ツイフォン登場
synopsis: From the north of the galaxy a dreadful menace, Comet Warrior God Tsuifon, is fast approaching the Earth destroying everything in its path. There awaits it Fighter Ultraman, the legendary defender of the planet, and a deadly battle is about to begin. (Source: AniDB)

title: Wuxia Shitu Yu Shier Zhan Ji
titleRomaji: Wuxia Shitu Yu Shier Zhan Ji
titleNative: 无限使徒与十二战姬
synonyms: The Limitless Apostle and the Twelve Battle Maidens
synopsis: He is recognized as the strongest existence, standing at the top of the world. Wealth? fame? Power? It was not worth mentioning in his eyes. The strongest apostles fled and startled the human continent for the reason: “Don’t get me wrong! Lao Zi came to look for his future wife! ”Yes, it’s a story about the strongest single apostle ever looking for a wife.

title: Ippatsu Kanta-kun
titleNative: 一発貫太くん
synopsis: Kanta lives with his mother, brothers, sisters, and dog named Judeth. He likes baseball, but his mom doesn't like him mentioning baseball, because his mother believes this was the cause of her husband's death. Info from ANN

titleRomaji: Kotowa Jiten: Hetana Teppou mo Kazu Ucha Ataru!
titleNative: ことわざ辞典 へたな鉄砲も数うちゃあたる！
synopsis: Amateur animation by 20-year-old Hideaki Anno while he was studying at Osaka University of Arts. The short is an animated form of the idiom "even a poor marksman will hit the target with enough shots".
